---
title: "Celigo_Well_Level_Plots"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r print-heat-map-labelled}
p<-plate_plot(
  data = NET_Data_Combined,
  title = "Run 15 CitH3 MFI",
  position = Well,
  value = AVG.CitH3.Mean.Intensity,
  label = Condition,
  label_size = 1.4, 
  scale = 0.9,
  plate_size = 48,
  plate_type = "round",
  show_legend = TRUE,
) +
    labs(fill = "") 

ggsave("Run15_CitH3MFI_Heatmap.pdf", plot = p, width = 4, height = 3)
print(p)
```
